output.context: Re-run after equal-height card fix. Fresh screenshots taken, no prior QA output read.
output.compositionNotes: Overall layout matches Figma. Dark charcoal background sections with rounded corners, progress bar pagination with gradient, navigation arrows in circular bordered buttons, cards displayed in Swiper carousel. The general proportions and visual weight match the Figma reference.

verificationItems.check: Equal-height cards within each carousel section

evidence.visual: In the blog section screenshot (dynamic-content-carousel-section-blog-cards-1440w.png), all three visible blog post cards have identical bottom edges. The 'LEARN MORE' CTAs are aligned on the same horizontal line across all cards despite varying title lengths ('Building Bridges: Our Annual Community Service Day' wraps to 2 lines, '5 Tips for Managing Stress During Exams' wraps to 2 lines, 'New Tutoring Program Launches This Semester' wraps to 2 lines). The card bottoms are visually flush. In the team section (dynamic-content-carousel-section-team-1440w.png), all three team member cards (Jane Smith, Marcus Chen, Sarah Johnson) show equal heights with 'GET IN TOUCH' CTAs aligned at the same baseline. In the resources section (dynamic-content-carousel-section-resources-1440w.png), all three resource cards show equal heights with 'VIEW RESOURCE' CTAs aligned at the same baseline despite different content lengths.
evidence.dom: The height chain is implemented via three layers: (1) swiper-slide has h-auto! class (confirmed on all 37 slides across 9 sections with content), (2) CSS rule '.dynamic-content-carousel .swiper-slide > *' sets height: 100% on the card wrapper, (3) each card template (card-post, card-team-member, card-resource, card-policy) uses 'h-full' on both the anchor and the article element, with 'flex flex-col' for internal layout.

verificationItems.check: CTA buttons pushed to bottom via mt-auto

evidence.visual: In blog cards, 'LEARN MORE' appears consistently at the bottom of each card regardless of title length. In resource cards, 'VIEW RESOURCE' sits at the bottom with varying amounts of space above it depending on content. In policy cards, 'View Resource' is bottom-aligned. In team member cards, 'GET IN TOUCH' is bottom-aligned.
evidence.dom: Page audit confirmed mt-auto elements present in all card types: cardPostMtAuto found in sections 0,1,6,8,9 (all blog post sections); cardTeamMtAuto found in section 2 (Meet the Team); cardResourceMtAuto found in section 3 (Browse Resources); cardPolicyMtAuto found in sections 4,7 (Our Policies, Hidden When Empty). Code verified: card-post.php line 48 has 'mt-auto pt-4', card-team-member.php line 51 has 'mt-auto pt-2', card-resource.php line 45 has 'mt-auto pt-4', card-policy.php line 28 has 'mt-auto pt-4'.

verificationItems.check: Image hover zoom CSS present in swiper.css

evidence.code: swiper.css lines 148-156 contain: '.dynamic-content-carousel .card-post img, .dynamic-content-carousel .card-team-member img { transition: transform 0.3s ease; }' and '.dynamic-content-carousel .card-post:hover img, .dynamic-content-carousel .card-team-member:hover img { transform: scale(1.05); }'. Both card-post and card-team-member image containers have 'overflow-hidden' class to clip the zoomed image.
evidence.note: Hover state cannot be visually verified in static screenshots. CSS rules are correctly defined.

verificationItems.check: No visual regressions at any breakpoint

evidence.desktop1440: All sections render correctly with 3 visible cards per row. Dark charcoal backgrounds have proper rounded corners. Progress bar pagination and nav buttons are visible and properly positioned. Typography hierarchy (eyebrow, heading, description) is correct.
evidence.laptop1024: Layout transitions well to narrower width. Cards maintain proper proportions. 2-3 cards visible per row depending on card type. No overflow or clipping issues observed.
evidence.tablet768: Two cards visible per row at tablet width. Cards maintain equal heights. Headers stack vertically. Navigation controls remain functional and visible. All content readable.
evidence.mobile375: Single card per slide on mobile. Cards stack vertically in the Swiper. Typography scales appropriately. CTA buttons remain at card bottom. No horizontal overflow. Category badges, dates, and titles all display correctly.
evidence.crossBrowser: Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit screenshots at all four breakpoints show consistent rendering. No browser-specific layout shifts, font rendering differences that affect layout, or missing elements were observed.

verificationItems.check: Cards work across all post types

evidence.blogPosts: Sections 'Blog', 'Other Initiatives', and others display blog post cards with image, category badge, title, date, and 'Learn More' CTA. 5 blog posts rendered per section.
evidence.teamMembers: 'Meet the Team' section displays 3 team member cards with photo, department badge, name, role, and 'Get In Touch' CTA on lime/accent background.
evidence.resources: 'Browse Resources' section displays 3 resource cards with audience and type badges, title, excerpt, and 'View Resource' CTA. Dark cards with rounded border.
evidence.policies: 'Our Policies' section displays 3 policy cards with topic badge, title, and 'View Resource' CTA. Same dark card style as resources with hover state support.

figmaComparison.notes: The Figma design at node 785:33970 shows an 'Other Initiatives' section with dark background, eyebrow text, heading, description, secondary button, progress bar pagination, navigation arrows, and 3 cards with rounded images and content below. The implementation matches this composition: (1) Dark charcoal background with rounded corners -- matches. (2) Two-column header with eyebrow + heading on left, description + button on right -- matches. (3) Gradient progress bar below header -- matches. (4) Circular bordered nav buttons at right -- matches. (5) Three cards with rounded-top images, category-like info, titles, body text, and CTAs -- matches. (6) Cards have equal height with CTAs aligned at bottom -- matches Figma's uniform card layout.

positiveFindings.description: Equal-height card fix verified. The three-layer height chain (h-auto! on swiper-slide, height:100% on slide child via CSS, h-full on card anchor and article) works correctly across all post types. Cards with varying content lengths visually align their bottom edges.

CTA button bottom-alignment via mt-auto is consistent across all four card types (post, team-member, resource, policy). The flexbox column layout with mt-auto pushes CTAs to the card bottom regardless of content height.

Cross-browser consistency is excellent. Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit render identically at all four breakpoints (375, 768, 1024, 1440) with no observable differences in card heights, spacing, typography, or layout.
Responsive behavior is smooth. Desktop shows 3 cards, tablet shows 2 cards, mobile shows 1 card. Cards maintain proper aspect ratios and content hierarchy at all widths.

The block properly handles edge cases: 'Featured Posts' section with no matching posts shows heading only (empty state). 'Hidden When Empty' section configured with hideIfEmpty still renders because it has content. Long heading text wraps cleanly without breaking layout. 'Minimal Carousel' without navigation/pagination renders cards without controls.
